target:
# Search for "tournament-screenshot" type files and poker table images specifically
curl -s "http://web.archive.org/cdx/search/cdx?url=www.fulltiltpoker.com/images/com/en/content*&output=text&limit=500&from=20080101&to=20101231&filter=statuscode:200&matchType=prefix" 2>&1 | grep -i "\.jpg" | grep -iv "banner\|bonus\|affiliate\|header\|logo\|icon\|button\|arrow\|bg\|background\|nav\|menu" | grep -i "screen\|shot\|table\|game\|poker\|play\|avatar\|client" | head -30
